 {"id":"phage_explorer-10p","title":"[WEB-P2] Core Visualization: Canvas Rendering Engine","description":"# Phase 2: Core Visualization (Target: Weeks 3-5)

## Purpose
Build the high-performance rendering engine that displays sequence data at 60fps. This is the visual heart of the application.

## Why This Matters
The sequence grid is the most frequently viewed component. Users scroll through thousands of bases constantly. Any frame drops or latency destroys the "instant feedback" experience that defines Phage Explorer.

## Design Philosophy
We render to Canvas 2D (not DOM) because:
1. **Performance**: DOM cannot achieve 60fps with 5000+ colored elements
2. **Control**: Pixel-perfect cyberpunk aesthetics
3. **Consistency**: Same visual output across browsers

WebGL is used for post-processing effects (glow, scanlines) that would be expensive in 2D.

## Deliverables
1. **Canvas Sequence Grid Renderer** - Main rendering engine
2. **Glyph Atlas** - Pre-rendered character sprites
3. **Virtual Scrolling** - Efficient rendering of 100k+ sequences
4. **Gene Map Renderer** - Canvas/SVG hybrid
5. **Sparkline Components** - Ported from TUI
6. **WebGL Post-Processing** - Shaders for effects

## Technical Architecture

### SequenceGridRenderer
```typescript
- OffscreenCanvas double-buffering
- High-DPI support (devicePixelRatio)
- Dirty region tracking for partial updates
- Color batching (group characters by color)
- requestAnimationFrame scheduling
```

### GlyphAtlas
```typescript
- Pre-render all nucleotides (ACGTN) + amino acids
- Single canvas texture for all characters
- drawGlyph() copies from atlas to destination
- ~10x faster than fillText() per character
```

### Virtual Scrolling
```typescript
- Only render visible rows + overscan
- Smooth scroll with momentum physics
- Prefetch ahead of scroll direction
- 60fps target with 100k+ bases
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] 60fps scrolling on 100k+ base sequences
- [ ] All nucleotide/amino acid colors match TUI
- [ ] Gene map shows correct positions and strands
- [ ] Scanlines and glow effects render correctly
- [ ] High-DPI displays render crisply
- [ ] Memory usage stable during extended scrolling

## Performance Targets
| Metric | Target |
|--------|--------|
| Frame time | <16.67ms |
| First paint | <100ms |
| Scroll latency | <8ms |
| Memory (100k seq) | <50MB |

## Risks & Mitigations
- **Risk**: Canvas performance varies across browsers
  - **Mitigation**: Test Safari, use conservative techniques
- **Risk**: Glyph atlas memory
  - **Mitigation**: Generate at runtime, don't ship as image
- **Risk**: WebGL shader complexity
  - **Mitigation**: Simple shaders first, optimize later

## Dependencies
- Phase 0 (app scaffold with theme system)
- Phase 1 (database for sequence data)","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","assignee":"","created_at":"2025-12-07T21:56:14.282689Z","updated_at":"2025-12-07T23:04:37.240754Z","closed_at":"2025-12-07T23:04:37.240754Z","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"phage_explorer-10p","depends_on_id":"phage_explorer-87z","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-07T22:04:30.294827Z","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"phage_explorer-10p","depends_on_id":"phage_explorer-pml","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-07T22:04:31.525345Z","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

Fix any WCAG 2.1 A/AA violations that appear, and leave a br comment with results + focused manual screen reader checklist.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"TealForest","created_at":"2026-01-30T22:19:26.134216707Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T22:19:38.610987523Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["a11y","polish","ux","web"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"phage_explorer-179r","depends_on_id":"phage_explorer-wzjl.2","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-01-30T22:19:26.151941422Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"phage_explorer-1cwn","title":"Task: Audit and fix all touch targets to 44px minimum","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","created_at":"2025-12-12T18:32:37.488564187Z","updated_at":"2025-12-12T22:52:22.322091771Z","closed_at":"2025-12-12T22:52:22.322091771Z","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"phage_explorer-1cwn","depends_on_id":"phage_explorer-y5wb","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-12T18:33:16.512172478Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":15,"issue_id":"phage_explorer-1cwn","author":"ubuntu","text":"# Audit and Fix Touch Targets to 44px Minimum

## WCAG 2.5.5 Requirement
Target Size (Level AAA): Touch targets must be at least 44x44 CSS pixels.

## Audit Methodology

### Step 1: Identify All Interactive Elements
```bash
# Find all clickable elements in web package
grep -r "onClick\|onPress\|role=\"button\"\|<button" packages/web/src --include="*.tsx"
```

### Step 2: Measure Current Sizes
Use browser DevTools to measure:
- Visual size (what user sees)
- Hit area (padding + element size)
- Spacing between targets

### Step 3: Document Violations
Create spreadsheet with:
| Component | Element | Current Size | Required | Gap |
|-----------|---------|--------------|----------|-----|
| Header | Menu btn | 32x32 | 44x44 | 12px |
| ... | ... | ... | ... | ... |

## Known Violations

### From Audit
1. **Badge buttons** - Often 24-32px
2. **Compact mode buttons** - Reduced for density
3. **Gene map segments** - Variable, often < 44px wide
4. **Overlay close buttons** - Sometimes 32px
5. **List item actions** - Small icons without padding

## Fix Strategy

### Option 1: Increase Visual Size
Make button visually larger.
```css
.btn-sm {
  min-height: 44px;
  min-width: 44px;
}
```

### Option 2: Expand Hit Area (Preferred)
Keep visual size, expand padding:
```css
.btn-sm {
  min-height: 32px; /* Visual */
  padding: 6px;     /* Hit area expands by 12px */
  /* Total hit area: 44px */
}
```

### Option 3: Invisible Hit Expander
For icons that must stay small:
```tsx
<button className="icon-btn">
  <span className="hit-area-expander" /> {/* 44x44 invisible */}
  <Icon size={20} />
</button>
```

## Files to Modify
- `packages/web/src/styles/mobile-overrides.css`
- `packages/web/src/styles/components.css`
- Individual components as needed

## Testing
- [ ] iPhone SE (smallest common screen)
- [ ] Test with fat-finger simulation
- [ ] Verify spacing between adjacent targets
- [ ] Screen reader reports correct bounds","created_at":"2025-12-12T18:34:20Z"},{"id":35,"issue_id":"phage_explorer-1cwn","author":"ubuntu","text":"IN PROGRESS (WhiteCreek): Taking this task. Will audit interactive elements and fix touch target sizes to meet 44px minimum.","created_at":"2025-12-12T22:50:35Z"}]}
